programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns that having a pet is a bigger responsibility than he expected when he takes care of a friend’s dog. When Baby Bop’s favorite teddy bear is torn, she wants to take him to the vet for help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, Barney helps her see that winter is a wonderful time. On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the activities you can do in the summer.

programme.title: Larry King Now: T.I.
programme.desc: Rapper, author and entrepreneur T.I. stops to by to discuss his highly-anticipated new album, Troubleman, his time in prison, and whether the free agent will sign with a new record label. Plus, T.I. offers his stance on gun control and pot legalization.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Snoop Lion
programme.desc: Larry sits down with Snoop Lion to talk about his new name, look, and faith. Plus, Snoop opens up about why he went from being a gun-toting rapper to spreading messages of non-violence in his new reggae song, "No Guns Allowed."

programme.title: Larry King Now: 50 Cent
programme.desc: You know him as a millionaire mogul at the top of his rap game. In this candid interview, 50 Cent sheds his public image to talk about growing up without a father, what he seeks in a partner & why the media doesn’t know who he really is.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Jason Derulo
programme.desc: Jason Derulo is back! The singer goes in depth with Larry about his first album since severely breaking his neck, dating another famous singer, and what he thinks of his current musical competition.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Ice Cube
programme.desc: Larry sits down with rapper turned actor and producer, Ice Cube, to talk about his new movie with Kevin Hart, his early years with seminal rap group NWA, and his thoughts on rap music today.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Akon
programme.desc: Music mogul and actor Akon reflects on his friendship with Michael Jackson, his work to bring electricity to Africa, and why he thinks monogamy is misguided. Plus, how Akon made Lady Gaga a superstar.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Common
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Larry welcomes a co-host to his den: NBA vet and style icon Baron Davis. The pair chat with Common about the importance of his tenth album, how his daughter influences his music, and his friendship with the late Maya Angelou.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Will.i.am
programme.desc: Black Eyed Peas' co-creator will.i.am talks with Larry King about his exciting new smart watch venture, what he thinks about Taylor Swift, and why he's "disappointed" in President Obama.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Big Sean
programme.desc: From New York City, rapper Big Sean joins Larry King for a well-rounded discussion about his new album Dark Sky Paradise, learning from boss and mentor Kanye West, and recording with girlfriend Ariana Grande.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Ludacris
programme.desc: Chris 'Ludacris' Bridges sits down with Larry King to talk about 'Furious 7,' his new album 'Ludaversal,' and his early days working the graveyard shift as a radio DJ.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Seal
programme.desc: Four-time Grammy winner Seal joins Larry for an in-depth conversation on his new album, what it’s like co-parenting with ex-wife Heidi Klum, his opinion of Obama’s tenure, and much more.

programme.title: Loving Elvis
programme.desc: In the 1970’s Elvis experiences a career renaissance. Back on top, he divorces Priscilla but can’t offset his enduring loneliness, or fight his demons, including underage women.

programme.title: Lynyrd Skynyrd - Gone With The Wind
programme.desc: This film revisits the story of Lynyrd Skynyrd in a manner previously unattempted. Using a mixture of new and archive interviews, contributions from band members and those closest to the group.

programme.title: Lynyrd Skynyrd - I'll Never Forget You: The Last 72 Hours Of Lynyrd Skynyrd
programme.desc: I'll Never Forget You: The Last 72 Hours of Lynyrd Skynyrd chronicles the story of three survivors: security guard Gene Odom, lead backup singer Leslie Hawkins and guitar tech Craig Reed.

programme.title: Madonna: Goddess of Pop
programme.desc: Madonna is a global mega star and one of the most recognizable music icons in history. Her phenomenal career has spanned four decades, selling more than three hundred million records worldwide.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped. Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry meant for the gods. However, the kidnapping was a trap to lure Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Here comes Beauty, the assassin hired by ICPO Headquarters to knock off Lupin! Overwhelmed by Beauty's powerful DumDum bullets, Lupin narrowly escapes with his life thanks to Jigen's quick thinking.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated country of Kimasan, after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure. They sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, the giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The 3rd Thieves Olympic is about to be held in Japan, and Lupin and Jigen are in it to win it! After winning the first and second Thieves Olympic, if they also win this year's getaway race, they'll become the first-ever Triple-Crown winners!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The world's largest diamond has been discovered in South Africa and Lupin has his eyes on the prize. But as it turns out, stealing it is the easy part!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko decides to marry Huffner for his jewelry collection, disregarding the rumor that Huffner's brides always die a mysterious death within a few weeks of their wedding. Turns out, he's also a collector of brides and likes them permanently preserved!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen receives a letter from Sister Angelica and heads to the African country of Borodias. Sister Angelica wants Jigen's help to rescue Dr. Othello, the leader of the country's independence movement.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO tries a different approach to capturing Lupin: Astrology. It enlists the help of Marianne, a clairvoyant who can read Lupin's actions using astrological predictions and her crystal ball.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko calls Lupin from Professor Pot's lab, but since Lupin is half-asleep, Jigen takes the call instead. Fujiko claims Professor Pot has accidentally invented a robot that manufactures diamonds, but Jigen doesn't believe a word she says and hangs up.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko has invited Lupin and company to a classical concert conducted by Kyoransky from the International Philharmonic. After they get a good look at Kyoransky's baton, studded with a a diamond worth at least 200 million yen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes to prison intent on making Silver tell what he did with the loot, only to discover that a new top-of-the-line prison was built over the site where he hid the money. Will the operation to trade an execution for the recovery of the money succeed?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the Golden Bell, symbol of the monarchy of Beltenberg and precious tourist attraction. However, the bell that sparkles in the belfry is just a brass replica.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin The 3rd "Good-Bye Partner"
programme.desc: When Zenigata is arrested for suspicion of being part of the Lupin gang, Lupin is talked into stealing Time Crystal to prove Pops' innocence.

programme.title: Lupin The 3rd "Blood Seal of the Eternal Mermaid"
programme.desc: The Mermaid's Scale is a mysterious aquamarine gemstone that Lupin has been hired to steal it... but it turns out to be a forgery. Now, he needs to find the real jewel before it can be used to destroy the whole world!

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Double-agent Elena Del Barra is acting bizarrely, sending a microfilm of defense secrets from her own country. Rollin is sent in to investigate and return the microfilm without its theft ever being detected.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dr. Cherlotov, a scientist of an enemy power, failed to defect to the West when his wife did. Now that he has developed a cheap, effective anti-ballistic system, the IMF is ordered to get him out.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Gangster Jack Wellman is moving syndicated crime into politics, killing off certain politicians and replacing them with men more sympathetic to the Syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Josef Varsh plans to put an American on trial on false charges, discredit the West, and gain power.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An imprisoned member of the Nazi party, Herbert Raynor, is released from prison and is being flown to Puerto Huberra in South America, along with other Nazis.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A former prison guard, Sefra, has acquired a supply of cesium 138, which explodes at temperatures above 70 degrees.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The team must break a Communist assassin who killed a U.S. Senator.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.desc: Dr. Sloan takes in an abandoned young girl found at the scene of a murder, while Steve and Jesse go about tracking down the killer.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mac must accompany a prisoner who once assaulted her across the country while Harm and Bud delve into the case of an HIV-infected fleet officer who, after having his condition revealed and relegated to inactive duty, wants his old job back.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Al enterarse de lo sucedido, Norma visita a Gabriela, quien muestra su amor de madre. Dínora se interna en unos pantanos, la policía previene a los Reyes sobre posibles nuevos ataques.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando y Fernando van a la casa donde dormía Dínora para borrar pistas que los comprometan, pero se sorprenden al verla, ella jura que la misión no termina hasta acabar con sus dos objetivos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Cansada de la agitada vida nocturna de su esposo, Gabriela se sincera con Sara, quien decide vigilar de cerca a Fernando y lo sigue hasta las pesebreras, donde tiene una cita con su amante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara le cuenta a su madre delante de Martín lo que vio y juntas van tras Fernando hasta una casa, donde reconocen en la oscuridad a su amante, Gabriela pide un arma y discute con su hija.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela echa a Fernando de la hacienda, pero Dínora irrumpe en su habitación por la noche y amenaza con matar a Sara si no la obliga a marcharse de la hacienda, Malcolm y Carmela se ríen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Delante de Fernando, Gabriela echa a Sara de la hacienda y le dice que ha decidido quedarse sola con su esposo. Norma tiene un mal presentimiento mientras Dínora vigila día y noche a su presa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora amenaza a Gabriela con lastimar a Martín si la delata de nuevo con la policía. Armando y Rosario visitan a Fernando y se enteran de que Dínora se esconde en la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario le reclama a Dínora por obligar a Gabriela a echar a Sara, y le aconseja a Martín que huya de la hacienda. Fernando lo traslada al primer piso para que no descubra a su amante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín le promete a su hija que no la abandonará jamás, Pepa inspecciona la nueva habitación de su amigo y amenaza a Fernando con denunciarlo por abuso. Los Reyes le dan la bienvenida a Sara.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica está preocupada, pues sabe que Lucho no se fue de San Pedro. La señora Guerra lleva a Rodrigo al hospital y no deja de seducirlo. Lagarto sufre un accidente.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro sufre por no poder ver a su hija y se emborracha. Verónica lo busca en el club, justo cuando Irene llega al lugar. Lucho se encarga de cuidar a Lucía. Chacón y Rodrigo están en el hospital. El comisionado besa a Antonia y Ricardo lo ve.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La luna de miel entre Verónica y Alejandro continúa intensa, pero se interrumpe cuando Irene se presenta en la junta de accionistas y los amenaza con un arma. El poder que Lucho ejerce sobre Irene es cada vez mayor. El Lagarto quiere hablar.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Irene no logra matar a la Patrona. Verónica le ofrece no denunciarla, si deja que Alejandro visite a su hija. Luego termina con Alejandro, porque siente que se ha vuelto tan monstruosa como Antonia, capaz de todo por una venganza. Maxi queda libre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma descubre que su bebé no tiene la cadena que le regaló Juan y se enfrenta con Gabriela, mientras que Martín le aconseja que vuelva con el padre de su hijo. Armando se enfurece con Rosario.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams take a leap of faith when choosing which detour challenge to take on. And, a split-second decision may make or break one team's life.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams must drum up enough strength for an intense head-to-head battle before checking into the mat.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Teams travel to Switzerland where they free-fall over 400 feet into the Gletscherschlucht Glacier Gorge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While in Switzerland, teams are surprised with the first ever public U-turn vote, where racers have to vote in front of each other.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams take a bumpy ride in Split, Croatia and try not to get tongue-twisted reciting poetry while in motion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams try not to crack while transporting eggs across town by bicycle in the Netherlands.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million on the line, the final four teams race through London. The team to cross the finish line first will be crowned the winners!

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: "The Amazing Race" celebrates travelling one million miles around the world when the 32nd race kicks off from Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Bogotá, Colombia, where they encounter the "Yield," which gives them the power to stop another team's race for a designated amount of time.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are in Manaus, Brazil, where they have big decisions to make when they encounter the first U-turn of the race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Asunción, Paraguay, where they must either stack a pyramid of watermelons or perform a traditional Paraguayan bottle dance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams in Paris, France, must whip up some tasty treats and make enough Chantilly cream for four pies, as well as compete in a series of carnival games.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Awakened by the cries of their daughter Bettina, Chris and Ruth Miller enter her room to find that she has vanished - even though they still hear her crying for help. Chris' physicist friend Bill thinks she moved into another dimension.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is a bitter, prejudiced man. Through unknown means, he intends to shrink every evil person in the world at four o'clock.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist creates an android that has the qualities which he feels he's lacking.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A US naval destroyer investigates a mysterious tapping sound coming from a sunken submarine.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Whisperers are coming for Hilltop; after Daryl and Lydia's encounter with Alpha, the communities must decide whether to run or fight; Eugene's communication with Stephanie gets complicated.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne takes Virgil back to his mysterious island to reunite with his family; in exchange, Virgil promises weapons that could change the tide of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Negan's help, Alpha and the Whisperers attack Hilltop.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Heroes and villains reckon with the aftermath of the Hilltop fire; Eugene takes a group on a journey to meet Stephanie, with the hopes of befriending another civilization.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities prepare for the final battle of the Whisperer War; meanwhile, Eugene's group encounters Princess.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beta engages the final battle of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie returns, to the dismay of Negan; the trials she endured since leaving have made her harder in order for her and her son to survive; Daryl and Maggie unexpectedly fight an unseen and unknown threat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol find an old cabin that takes Daryl back to his years away from the group after Rick disappeared; he relives the painful memory of meeting a reticent survivor and the toxic events that amplified his relationship with Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie's map, Gabriel and Aaron search for food and supplies to bring back to Alexandria; checking out one more location, they chance upon a stash; faith is broken and optimism is fragmented when they are put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko, and Princess are captured and separated by the mysterious troopers that surrounded them at the rail yard; claustrophobic with mounting anxiety, Princess struggles with memories of her traumatic past and plans to escape.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: At the lowest point in their friendship, Daryl and Carol come to a fork in the road and head their separate ways; Carol returns to Alexandria, while Daryl stays on the road, each going into their own type of survival mode.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie back at Alexandria, Carol takes Negan on a journey to minimize the increasing tension; here, Negan reflects on his late wife, Lucille, and the events that led him to this point.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: A lone traveler's wearying journey is interrupted by new acquaintances, some who become friend, others who become foe.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: A troubled survivor finds allies in an unexpected place; the life Madison has fought to build comes under threat.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Madison and Morgan try to help Nick find inner peace; a quest for revenge exacts its toll on the group.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Al's questioning uncovers some surprising truths about the group's past; John Dorie receives unexpected news.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick busca provisiones y armas con las que contentar a sus nuevos aliados en la lucha contra Negan. Mientras, Rosita está cada vez más impaciente por comenzar la guerra y en Alexandria, Tara deberá tomar una decisión trascendental.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Salvadores acuden a un encuentro con habitantes del Reino para llevarse los suministros que les cobran a cambio de protección, pero algo sucede y las cosas no marchan tal y como deberían.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Salvadores visitan Hilltop inesperadamente, sorprendiendo a todo el mundo, y su intención va más allá de la de cobrar el pago de suministros. Además, Rosita y Sasha se dirigen al campamento de los Salvadores con la intención de asesinar a Negan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick lleva a cabo una peligrosa misión para obtener armas de la comunidad de mujeres en la que estuvo Tara, quieran ellas o no cooperar. Además, Negan mantiene cautiva a Sasha.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La batalla final contra los Salvadores se aproxima, mientras Sasha se encuentra a merced de Negan y Dwight trata de demostrar a Rick que ha sido sincero con ellos y quiere ver a Negan muerto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y su grupo, junto con los del Reino y Hilltop, están preparados para comenzar la lucha contra Negan y los Salvadores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los aliados de Alexandria atacan a la vez diferentes guaridas de los Saviors, pero estos los superan en número y armamento y la batalla va a ser intensa, cruel y no exenta de bajas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Con Rick contra las cuerdas, la guerra contra los Saviors se recrudece y Hilltop, el Reino y Alexandria conocen el verdadero potencial del ejército de Negan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Saviors poseen un arma de gran potencia que pretenden transportar para ayudar a Negan. Ezekiel, que ha sobrevivido a la matanza de sus hombres, y Carol, aislada en territorio enemigo, son los únicos que pueden impedir la entrega del arma.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Gabriel y Negan tienen que cooperar para salir con vida de la casa en la que están encerrados, con decenas de muertos vivientes tratando de comérselos. Mientras, los lugartenientes de Negan se dan cuenta de que uno de ellos es un traidor, ¿quién?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick visita a Jadis para convencerla de que se una a ellos en la lucha contra Negan. En Hilltop, Gregory sugiere a Maggie, que está enojada con Jesus porque está alimentando a los prisioneros, que los ahorque. Carl se encuentra con Siddiq.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Tara rompen el muro del Santuario y los zombis entran al recinto. Negan exige a Eugene que idee una manera de sacarlos con vida de allí. Jadis prepara a Rick una muerte horrenda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan y sus hombres atacan a las tres comunidades rebeldes al mismo tiempo. Sin Rick, Carl asume la defensa de Alexandria, cercada por el propio Negan. Mientras, Simon detiene al ejército de Hilltop en la carretera y Gavin quiere capturar a Ezekiel.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carl hace una última petición a Rick y Michonne antes de morir. Mientras tanto, Morgan y Carol intentan rescatar a Ezekiel antes de que Gavin se lo entregue vivo a Negan para que este lo torture y asesine delante de sus seguidores.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to guard a member of an investment group set up so the surviving member will gain all the assets.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to escort the Sultan of Ramapurand his sacred white elephant, a gift to President Grant.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter a society lady who plans to change the U.S.A. into a monarchy and reign as its queen.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon Again tangle with pint-sized Dr. Loveless, who has another king-sized plan to achieve world conquest.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A master criminal determines to implant a device in President Grant's brain that will make him respond to the criminal's orders.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon get involved with a Croatian king and a werewolf-type who plots to control the King's country.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon again meet archfiend Dr. Loveless, who plans to take over arsenal and sub-treasury and become a dictator.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner quiet his banging pipes by installing a water hammer shock suppressor, then the guys ask "What is it?" and Tom and Kevin install a pre-hung fiberglass exterior door.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Our "kids” episode features projects parents and kids can build together! A raised bed for growing vegetables, an indoor mini-golf course and a model rocket launcher using commonly available items.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner install a new "dual flush" water-saving toilet, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Roger and Kevin head install an in-ground sprinkler system any homeowner can install.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner install a new type of "zoning" control for her forced-air heating and cooling system, the guys ask "What is it?" and Tom helps re-grout a homeowner’s bathroom tile floor.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom prepares concrete basement walls for finished wallboard. Richard shows Kevin how to tie a few basic knots, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger demonstrates how to care for storm-damaged trees.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva helps a homeowner install a new garage door. Then Richard Trethewey shows a homeowner how to "winterize" his plumbing to prevent frozen pipes when the house is unoccupied.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps a homeowner install a new bathroom ventilation fan, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger shows homeowners how to care for their lawn without using chemicals or pesticides.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard repairs a leaking PVC drain trap underneath a kitchen sink, the guys ask: "What is it?", Tom installs a new, bamboo "floating" floor and Roger shows how to clean roof gutters without a ladder.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook kicks off our 8th season by building a cozy campfire pit in a homeowner’s backyard, the guys ask "What is it?" and Tom installs a range hood and microwave over a homeowner’s stovetop.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and an electrician to install a home intercom system, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Richard makes a wood-burning fireplace cleaner and more energy efficient by installing a gas-burning insert.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger transforms a small urban backyard into a pleasant outdoor living space, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Tom shows Kevin new ways to install fiber cement siding without creating a lot of dust.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs new aluminum gutters and downspouts, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Richard helps a homeowner install a new energy-efficient clothes washer and dryer.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom Silva helps a pair of homeowners install a new sliding glass door. Afterward, Tom, Kevin O'Connor, landscaper Roger Cook and plumbing and heating expert Richard Trethewey ask, "What is it?"

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger joins plant expert Carrie Kelly to learn about container gardening. Tom and Kevin discuss different flooring. Kevin helps a homeowner install a new rooftop antenna for his digital TV.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom helps a homeowner seal out drafts by installing weather-stripping. Kevin discusses ways to monitor and save electricity. Richard helps a homeowner determine a new heating system’s proper size.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build a basic picnic table using common framing lumber, the guys ask: "What is it?" and Richard helps a homeowner install a new utility sink in a basement laundry area.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger learn about Harvard’s new organic lawn-care program. Kevin makes "compost tea.”, the guys ask: "What is it?" and Tom prevents attic mildew by re-routing an improperly vented bathroom fan.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs stone veneer over an ugly concrete retaining wall, the guys ask: "What is it?" and Richard retrofits dampers in forced-air HVAC ducts. Tom shares a tip about foam-can insulating.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build and install new laminate kitchen countertops, the guys ask:"What is it?" and Roger helps a homeowner create a clean border between a garden bed and a lawn using steel edging.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger improves a concrete retaining wall with wooden lattice and climbing vines, the guys ask, "What is it?" and Tom shows how to flash a newly-installed window. Richard quiets a PVC plumbing vent.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard repairs a broken water softener, the guys ask "What is it?" and Roger helps a homeowner repair and prevent deer damage to his evergreen trees. Tom shares a tip on reducing sanding dust.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger conserves water by installing an innovative rainwater collection system. The guys ask "What is it?" and Tom helps homeowners connect two rooms by removing an interior load-bearing wall.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps a homeowner cool off his garage workshop with a ductless air conditioning system. The guys ask "What is it?" and Tom eliminates a mysterious leak in a living room ceiling.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs crown molding in a bedroom using an innovative fastening system. The guys ask "What is it?" and Roger and Kevin head outside to replace a rotting cedar fence post.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi
programme.desc: On March 10th, 1986 Marvin Hagler and John Mugabi fought at the Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena in Las Vegas for IBF, WBA and WBC world middleweight titles while Mugabi was ranked number 1 by all three bodies the fight ended in a victory for Hagler.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On April 15th, 1985, Marvin Hagler fought Thomas Hearns for the undisputed Middleweight Title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. Hagler and Hearns absolutely went at it from the bell which ended with Hagler securing a thrilling knockout victory.

programme.title: Matthew Saad Muhammad vs Yaqui Lopez 1
programme.desc: On October 24th, 1978 Matthew Saad Muhammad fought Yaqui Lopez for the first time for Light Heavyweight titles at the Spectrum in Philidelphia, in a 15 round bout that ended in the fourteenth round securing the victory for Muhammad.

programme.title: Michael Carabajal vs Jorge Arce
programme.desc: On July 31st, 1999 Michael Carabajal faced Jorge Arce for the WBO World Light flyweight title at Plaza de Toros El Toreo in Tijuana in a 12 round bout that went 11 rounds giving the bout to Carabajal.

programme.title: Michael Carbajal vs Humberto Gonzalez 1
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993, Michael Carbajal fought Humberto Gonzalez for the WBC and IBF Light Flyweight Titles in Las Vegas. After being knocked down twice earlier in the fight, Carbajal made an incredible comeback, knocking out Gonzalez in the 7th round.

programme.title: Micky Ward vs Alfonso Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997 Micky Ward and Alfonso Sanchez faced eachother at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas the 10 round bout ended after seven giving Ward the victory by technical knockout.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Antonio Margarito 2
programme.desc: On December 3rd, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Antonio Margarito in a highly anticipated championship rematch at the Madison Square Garden in New York. This time around, Cotto showed his dominance from the start and stopped Margarito in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2005 Miguel Cotto fought DeMarcus Corley for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at the Coliseo Ruben Rodriguez in Bayamon with Corley going down twice in the 5th round securing the technical knockout victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Delvin Rodriguez
programme.desc: On October 5th, 2013 Miguel Cotto battled Delvin Rodriguez at the Amway Center in Orlando, Fl. The originally twelve round bout lasted three rounds and ended by technical knockout in third round securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Joshua Clottey
programme.desc: On June 13th, 2009, Miguel Cotto fought Joshua Clottey for the WBO World Welterweight Title at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite Clottey landing more shots, Cotto was persistent with his attack, helping him earn a close split decision win.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Kelson Pinto
programme.desc: On September 11th, 2004 Miguel Cotto faced Kelson Pinto at the Coliseo Jose Miguel Agrelot in Hato Rey in battle for WBO World Super lightweight titles with the bout ending halfway through in the sixth round securing the win for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Muhammad Abdullaev
programme.desc: On June 11th, 2005 Miguel Cotto faced Muhammad Abdullaev for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York the twelve round bout ended in the ninth securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: On March 12th, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Ricardo Mayorga for the World Super Welterweight Championship at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight, Miguel Cotto prevailed, knocking down Mayorga in the final round and getting the stoppage.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Sergio Martinez
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2014 Miguel Cotto and Sergio Martinez fought eachother for the WBC world middleweight titles in a bout that ended early in the tenth round with a victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Shane Mosley
programme.desc: On November 10th. 2007 Miguel Cotto fought Shane Mosley at Madison Square Garden in New York City for the WBA World welterweight title in a full 12 round bout that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin arrives in the Texas border town of Jody with a murder suspect named Joselito Kincaid. Their appearance creates tension: this is cow country, and Kincaid is a sheepherder.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: When a group of men kill Paladin's prisoner, Paladin must bring the group of murders to justice.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired to find the princess of a tiny kingdom who disappeared while making a United States tour.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired by the wife of a man who's terrorized by his hometown. The Southerner is hated because of his role in the Lincoln assassination.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: The hunter becomes the hunted. When Paladin captures a former slave turned outlaw, a gang of rough bounty hunters fight to take his prisoner, dead or alive.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Have gun - will collect taxes. Paladin teams up with a powerful rancher to collect taxes from some of the roughest cattle-rustlers in the West.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Stranded in a mountain cabin during a snowstorm, a sinister, Satan-worshipping outlaw bets Paladin he can do the unthinkable: corrupt the soul of an honest lawman.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: As a favor to an old friend, Paladin captures two teenagers sentenced for execution.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister faces off against Apache chief Geronimo after an army supply train is attacked. In a shootout, Clay kills one brave and captures another. In retaliation, Geronimo warns more will die unless Hollister releases the Indian prisoner.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Fugitive Logan Beatty hides out at the ranch of Alan Danbury. Danbury's daughter Kay, falling in love with the outlaw, helps disarm Sheriff Hollister when he comes to arrest Beatty. Hollister, Beatty, and Kay's father battle for the girl.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Mitt Porter is involved in a robbery in which his partner Billy Clyde kills a man. Hollister tricks Matt into leading him to Billy's hideout, but Billy is killed before he can clear Mitt. Hollister and the editor then learn about the tragedy of his life.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: In love with Sally Wilson, Bill Hartley strikes a vein of silver while working on Tombstone's Main Street and sees a chance to win her heart. But when Bill is buried in a cave in, Sally must decide if she saves Bill or guard the secret of the mine.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: An outlaw gang ambushes a Mexican pack train near Tombstone. Don Jacinto Orosco, the sole survivor of the attack, refuses to wait for American law to deal justice to the gang. Instead, he sends for heavily-armed Mexicans to wipe out the killers.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Frank Callaway wins acquittal for a client and then escapes death at the hands of the two men who tried to frame his client. Sheriff Hollister captures the killer but no lawyer will accept the defense; so Callaway himself volunteers.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The World's Fastest Gun,' Billy Denver, comes to Tombstone to perform. Challenged by Johnny's Pearce, he faces his first human target - and kills him. When Johnny's brother hears the news, he heads for Tombstone to avenge his brother's death.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Elias Ransome brings his band of religious emigrants to the outskirts of Tombstone, but a prejudiced rancher stirs up agitation against the newcomers, leading to an air of intolerance. Hollister and Clabourne must step in to resolve the situation.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson is a gambler, empire-builder, Indian-fighter and journalist. He uses his derringer and gold-headed cane to win the justice he believes to be right.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson's friend 'Cactus Charlie' Hayden strikes gold. When he repays Bat for staking him it's revealed that the gold is part of a missing shipment. Bat and Hayden set out to make the best of a bad situation - and do so.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Though his sympathies lay with the open-range cattleman in their fight against their old enemy, the railroads, Bat Masterson doesn't countenance their lawlessness. So, Bat finds himself in opposition to his friends.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson, the Frontier's best turkey shoot judge, has his hands full at Midas Creek. The town council hires him to serve a double purpose - judge the turkey shoot and make sure that bully-boy Rance Fletcher doesn't mess up the fun.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Investor Bat Masterson, in partnership with mine owner Augustus Ulbrecht, reaps the wages of mismanagement. Ulbrecht, indifferent to the safety of the men, forces them to work despite reports that the diggings are about to cave in.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: When Sir Edward Marion unexpectedly downs a famous 'fast gun,' he attains a certain dangerous notoriety. This brings him to the notice of Bat Masterson with whom he exchanges some unusual demonstrations of fancy gunmanship.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Gambling Hall Owner Bat Masterson is mystified when business booms but profits plummet. Investigating, he finds his partner's fingers in the cash drawer - and slams it shut.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Gallant Bat Masterson turns Cupid's little mailman. When the man escorting three mail-order brides to Noble Creek, is shot, Bat becomes his replacement. For some unknown reason, a certain 'hot gun' doesn't want the gals to arrive.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey's next on his hit list. What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey's hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world's most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm. Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck. Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up as long as he believes in the heart of the cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: To counter Arkana's Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: the Dark Magician Girl!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes. Will Weevil's royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik's nefarious Rare Hunters, the silent but deadly Strings.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters: the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magic card Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts. If Joey wins, he'll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training, and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it's too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
